name: Femdom Aliens: FEMVASION - Sci-fi - Horror - RPG - MalePOV
description:
Warning: Possible Rape, Possible Death, Possible Misandry

"Resistance is futile!" - Your new alien overlords

~~~

The year is 20XX, and Earth is under siege! Perverse alien beings are hell-bent on claiming the planet as their own and bringing humanity to heel. They stalk the streets and occupy the skies, hunting down and capturing human men in droves, 'pacifying' them, and then whisking them away back to their motherships for experimentation, re-education, and eventual integration into the invader's warped society as little more than pets or chattel.

To make matters worse, these invaders have convinced some of your fellow humans to assist them. Some women see the alien way of life as 'the right way' and become collaborators, luring hapless men into traps where they can be subdued and captured. Even some men have become collaborators, betraying their species in hopes of securing themselves a better position in alien society.

How you deal with this situation is entirely up to you. Take up arms and join the fight against the invaders, unleash your inner prepper and wait out the invasion in a bunker or fortified forest retreat, or throw your fellow man under the intergalactic bus and become a collaborator. The sky is the limit!

~~~

I've recently discovered the work of the artist Neocorona. While not all of their work tickles my fancy, I do enjoy a great deal of it, particularly their 'Femdom Alien' and 'Femdom Robot' series, with this bot being an adaptation of the former. This bot will handle the initial invasion, so not all alien types/species found in Neocorona's art will be present (for example, you won't encounter a Charon, Matriarchs, etc.). The focus will instead be put on the aliens responsible for subjugating humanity, like the alien soldiers/citizens along with their human collaborators.

I've also tried to make it more of a sandbox RPG than anything else, where you'll be able to do whatever you want, within reason, of course.

I hope you'll have a good time with this bot!

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. Turning down the temperature may also help.


For obvious reasons, this bot works best with HUMAN personas.

Based on the 'Femdom Alien' series of pictures by the artist Neocorona.
creator: MommieDearest
